case_title: AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC VS. ADAM LAIDLOW

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LAIDLOW, ADAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAIDLOW, ADAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1222 HARRISON STREET #6612, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAIDLOW, ADAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $4,758.50 RENT, $515.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $467.00 COSTS, $8,477.84 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $320.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,898.34, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
